PreToolUse.command: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if [ -z "$CMD" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git\s+(add|commit)"; then STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); if echo "$STAGED" | grep -qiE "\.(env|pem|key|p12|pfx|credentials|secret)$"; then echo "BLOCKED: Potentially sensitive file staged for commit." >&2; echo "Files: $(echo "$STAGED" | grep -iE "\.(env|pem|key|p12|pfx|credentials|secret)$")" >&2; exit 2; fi; CONTENT=$(git diff --cached 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qiE "(api[_-]?key|api[_-]?secret|password|secret[_-]?key|access[_-]?token|private[_-]?key)\s*[:=]\s*[\x27\"][^\x27\"]{8,}"; then echo "WARNING: Possible secret detected in staged changes. Review carefully." >&2; fi; fi; exit 0'
PreToolUse.windows: bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command // empty"); if [ -z "$CMD" ]; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "git\s+(add|commit)"; then STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); if echo "$STAGED" | grep -qiE "\.(env|pem|key|p12|pfx|credentials|secret)$"; then echo "BLOCKED: Potentially sensitive file staged for commit." >&2; echo "Files: $(echo "$STAGED" | grep -iE "\.(env|pem|key|p12|pfx|credentials|secret)$")" >&2; exit 2; fi; CONTENT=$(git diff --cached 2>/dev/null); if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qiE "(api[_-]?key|api[_-]?secret|password|secret[_-]?key|access[_-]?token|private[_-]?key)\s*[:=]\s*[\x27\"][^\x27\"]{8,}"; then echo "WARNING: Possible secret detected in staged changes. Review carefully." >&2; fi; fi; exit 0'
